_comment: A 10-target arena evaluation subset for melanoma, drawn from eval/data/melanoma.labels.json (OpenTargets drug-in-clinic ground truth, EFO MONDO_0005012). 3 ground-truth positives + 7 negatives. Subagents produce one 5R hypothesis card per target (eval/arena_set/cards/<SYMBOL>.json); the arena's axis-judges then compare pairs to build a Pareto front, and AUGC scores the resulting ranking against these labels.

targets.note: DDR kinase; no melanoma drug-in-clinic at threshold
cell-cycle; PHASE_1 only, below positive threshold
PI3K/AKT; no melanoma drug-in-clinic at threshold
HER2; not a melanoma clinical target at threshold
telomerase; promoter-mutated in melanoma but no drug-in-clinic
chromatin; no melanoma drug-in-clinic at threshold
mTOR; no melanoma-specific drug-in-clinic at threshold
